description: Scatterplot visualization tool for analyzing differential gene expression.
author: Scott Davis (GlaxoSmithKline)
plan:
## MultiplotStudio GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
MultiplotStudio is a GenePattern module that Scatterplot visualization tool for analyzing differential gene expression.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 2 parameters:
- Required: dataFile
- Optional: classFile

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> -Dfile.encoding\=UTF8 -Dsun.java2d.d3d\=true -Dsun.java2d.dpiaware\=true -Dsun.java2d.ddscale\=true -Dsun.java2d.translaccel\=true -Xms192m -XX\:+UseG1GC -jar <libdir>MultiplotStudio.jar <dataFile> <classFile>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: dataFile
parameters.description: GenePattern dataset (*.gct), Multiplot Studio Workspace file (*.msdata) or CSV (see help for format requirements).

parameters.name: classFile
parameters.description: Class file (*.cls). Not required, but lack of a class file will result in fewer calculation options. Ignored if dataFile is a Workspace.
